channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 【8月上旬開催のフェス】 「LuckyFes'26」今年の熱中症対策を発表 https://natalie.mu/m…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【8月上旬開催のフェス】
「LuckyFes'26」今年の熱中症対策を発表
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681936?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

昨年の熱中症による救急搬送は0人
「熱中症ゼロ目標」を掲げ、対策を強化
item.content:encoded:
【8月上旬開催のフェス】
「LuckyFes'26」今年の熱中症対策を発表

昨年の熱中症による救急搬送は0人
「熱中症ゼロ目標」を掲げ、対策を強化

item.title: 今日のお昼ごはん #青空ごはん部 山に持って行った非常食用のパン 家で食べるには甘すぎ！
item.author: はたけん (@hataken1151.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日のお昼ごはん #青空ごはん部
山に持って行った非常食用のパン
家で食べるには甘すぎ！
item.content:encoded:
今日のお昼ごはん #青空ごはん部
山に持って行った非常食用のパン
家で食べるには甘すぎ！

item.title: Tehran's Hormuz threat risks global fallout, Rubio warns as …
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)

item.title: 隣町にトライアルがオープンしたので、 開店セールへ。 “カツ重専用機械”の開発導入と言う パワーワードが目に留まり、 …
item.author: 101匹足利尊氏 (@wandw.bsky.social)
item.description:
隣町にトライアルがオープンしたので、
開店セールへ。

“カツ重専用機械”の開発導入と言う
パワーワードが目に留まり、
お惣菜の三元豚ロースかつ重を試してみる。

税込299円で、この玉子綴じの黄色さは、気合いの違いだけでなく、
物流含めたシステムによる賜物。
IT企業の実力を痛感したふわとろな一品でした☺️

尚、皿にわざわざ移し替えたのは、
いつもの自炊班の見栄ですね🙄

#青空ごはん部
item.content:encoded:
隣町にトライアルがオープンしたので、
開店セールへ。

“カツ重専用機械”の開発導入と言う
パワーワードが目に留まり、
お惣菜の三元豚ロースかつ重を試してみる。

税込299円で、この玉子綴じの黄色さは、気合いの違いだけでなく、
物流含めたシステムによる賜物。
IT企業の実力を痛感したふわとろな一品でした☺️

尚、皿にわざわざ移し替えたのは、
いつもの自炊班の見栄ですね🙄

#青空ごはん部

item.title: 暑いですね ここ広島はもうすぐ三十五度になります ちょっとだけ涼を感じられれば良いのですが あさ撮りの 川面に佇む とり…
item.author: 🦀川口 掌🦀 (@kawaguchitenohira.bsky.social)
item.description:
暑いですね ここ広島はもうすぐ三十五度になります
ちょっとだけ涼を感じられれば良いのですが
あさ撮りの 川面に佇む とり です
item.content:encoded:
暑いですね ここ広島はもうすぐ三十五度になります
ちょっとだけ涼を感じられれば良いのですが
あさ撮りの 川面に佇む とり です

item.title: 荻窪の、灯花さんで。 鯛塩ラーメン、美味しい😋 今月で閉まるそうなので、間に合ってよかったです。 別のところでもお店や…
item.author: しろまむ (@shiromamu.bsky.social)
item.description:
荻窪の、灯花さんで。
鯛塩ラーメン、美味しい😋
今月で閉まるそうなので、間に合ってよかったです。
別のところでもお店やってるから、今度食べたくなったら、検索してみよう。

#青空ごはん部
#ラーメン
#鯛塩ラーメン
item.content:encoded:
荻窪の、灯花さんで。
鯛塩ラーメン、美味しい😋
今月で閉まるそうなので、間に合ってよかったです。
別のところでもお店やってるから、今度食べたくなったら、検索してみよう。

#青空ごはん部
#ラーメン
#鯛塩ラーメン

item.title: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to…
item.author: The Liberal BoJack (@thelibbojack.bsky.social)
item.description: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to become a certified pet stylist at Petco. One grooms dogs… the other carry’s guns. This is what’s wrong with our country.
item.content:encoded: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to become a certified pet stylist at Petco. One grooms dogs… the other carry’s guns. This is what’s wrong with our country.

item.title: Advances in AI could dramatically alter the energy demands f…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Advances in AI could dramatically alter the energy demands from a sector that’s pressuring global electricity grids, according to Temasek, Singapore’s state-owned investor.
item.content:encoded: Advances in AI could dramatically alter the energy demands from a sector that’s pressuring global electricity grids, according to Temasek, Singapore’s state-owned investor.

item.title: When companies like Aetna or UnitedHealthcare want to rein i…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
When companies like Aetna or UnitedHealthcare want to rein in costs, they turn to EviCore, whose business model depends on turning down payments for care recommended by doctors for their patients.

(Published Oct. 2024 with @capitolforum.bsky.social)
item.content:encoded:
When companies like Aetna or UnitedHealthcare want to rein in costs, they turn to EviCore, whose business model depends on turning down payments for care recommended by doctors for their patients.

(Published Oct. 2024 with @capitolforum.bsky.social)

item.title: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven fo…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven for countless living creatures. Wetlands are not empty spaces waiting to be developed. They are nurseries for birds, natural water filters, flood defenses, and wildlife habitats that cannot be replaced once lost.
item.content:encoded: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven for countless living creatures. Wetlands are not empty spaces waiting to be developed. They are nurseries for birds, natural water filters, flood defenses, and wildlife habitats that cannot be replaced once lost.

item.title: 𝙽𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚎 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜𝚗’𝚝 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍 𝚞𝚜 𝚝𝚘 '𝚜𝚊𝚟𝚎' 𝚒�…
item.author: 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝙼𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗 (@standingmountain.bsky.social)
item.description:
𝙽𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚎 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜𝚗’𝚝 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍 𝚞𝚜 𝚝𝚘 '𝚜𝚊𝚟𝚎' 𝚒𝚝,
𝙸𝚝 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍𝚜 𝚞𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚜𝚝𝚘𝚙 𝚍𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚝.

𝚃𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎’𝚜 𝚊 𝚖𝚊𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚏𝚏𝚎𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚎—

#Earth🌎 🌤️🌱🤎
item.content:encoded:
𝙽𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚎 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜𝚗’𝚝 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍 𝚞𝚜 𝚝𝚘 '𝚜𝚊𝚟𝚎' 𝚒𝚝,
𝙸𝚝 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍𝚜 𝚞𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚜𝚝𝚘𝚙 𝚍𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚝.

𝚃𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎’𝚜 𝚊 𝚖𝚊𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚏𝚏𝚎𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚎—

#Earth🌎 🌤️🌱🤎

item.title: I love the Upper Peninsula of Michigan so much. What a great…
item.author: Matt Bell (@mdbell79.bsky.social)

item.content:encoded: I love the Upper Peninsula of Michigan so much. What a great end to the day.

item.title: Heavy plumes of smoke rose near Bordeaux-Merignac Airport, w…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Heavy plumes of smoke rose near Bordeaux-Merignac Airport, where two firefighters were killed battling in the area, French officials said. Meanwhile, a wildfire in the Var department burned through over 1200 acres and continued spreading toward Cotignac, authorities confirmed.
item.content:encoded: Heavy plumes of smoke rose near Bordeaux-Merignac Airport, where two firefighters were killed battling in the area, French officials said. Meanwhile, a wildfire in the Var department burned through over 1200 acres and continued spreading toward Cotignac, authorities confirmed.

item.title: One of my views in Katmai National Park last week. Count the…
item.author: Patrick Barron 🐻〽️ (@bluebarronphoto.bsky.social)
item.description:
One of my views in Katmai National Park last week. Count the bears!

The salmon are coming in and the bears are hungry!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: ジャック・ドーシーのBlockが開発者向けグループチャット「Buzz」をリリース、SlackやGitHubへの依存を減ら…

item.title: A federal judge has approved a US$1.5 billion copyright sett…
item.author: That guy (@stuartbayens.bsky.social)
item.description: A federal judge has approved a US$1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about US$3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.
item.content:encoded: A federal judge has approved a US$1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about US$3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

item.title: I must admit, I didn’t watch a single World Cup match, but I…
item.author: Ricky Davila (@therickydavila.bsky.social)
item.description: I must admit, I didn’t watch a single World Cup match, but I did watch as tens of thousands of people booed the orange felon ferociously and it couldn’t have been a more beautiful sound.
item.content:encoded: I must admit, I didn’t watch a single World Cup match, but I did watch as tens of thousands of people booed the orange felon ferociously and it couldn’t have been a more beautiful sound.

item.title: Young Woman in Green, 1930 by Tamara de Lempicka (Polish,189…
item.author: ΜΑΝΟΣ ΤΡΑΧΙΑΣ™ (@trahias.bsky.social)
item.description:
Young Woman in Green, 1930 by Tamara de Lempicka (Polish,1898 - 1980).
Oil, cardboard | 61 × 45 cm.
Location: Centre Pompidou Paris, France.

#art #painting #artist #BlueSkyArt
item.content:encoded:

Oil, cardboard | 61 × 45 cm.
Location: Centre Pompidou Paris, France.

item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description: Mamdani reverses on pledge to arrest Netanyahu
item.content:encoded: Mamdani reverses on pledge to arrest Netanyahu

item.title: "There are other capable progressives weighing a run in 2028…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description:
"There are other capable progressives weighing a run in 2028," writes @sunraysunray.bsky.social.

"However, none of them can do the two things AOC can do at once: run a serious national campaign as one of the most recognized figures in the country, and pull an entire movement into being behind it."
item.content:encoded:
"There are other capable progressives weighing a run in 2028," writes @sunraysunray.bsky.social.

"However, none of them can do the two things AOC can do at once: run a serious national campaign as one of the most recognized figures in the country, and pull an entire movement into being behind it."

item.title: I T H E H O U R B E T W E E N L I G H T A N D M…
item.author: yvesbroeckx.bsky.social (@yvesbroeckx.bsky.social)
item.description:
I T H E H O U R B E T W E E N L I G H T
A N D M E M O R Y I

The city is still there, you just have to trust the silence enough to find it. This work explores the fragile beauty of places that reveal themselves only when the world slows down.
#Art #OilPainting #Atmosphere #Venice
item.content:encoded:
I T H E H O U R B E T W E E N L I G H T
A N D M E M O R Y I

The city is still there, you just have to trust the silence enough to find it. This work explores the fragile beauty of places that reveal themselves only when the world slows down.
#Art #OilPainting #Atmosphere #Venice

item.title: Der er så mange fine detaljer i naturen, hvis man bare huske…
item.author: Drea (@an-drea.bsky.social)
item.description:
Der er så mange fine detaljer i naturen, hvis man bare husker at stoppe op ...

... for at få vejret 😅🏃‍♀️

#nature #bloomscrolling #morning
item.content:encoded:
Der er så mange fine detaljer i naturen, hvis man bare husker at stoppe op ...

... for at få vejret 😅🏃‍♀️

#nature #bloomscrolling #morning

item.title: Nadie nace racista. Ningún niño es racista. Es un defecto q…
item.author: Hannibal Lecter 🦋 (@hannibal.bsky.social)
item.description:
Nadie nace racista. Ningún niño es racista.

Es un defecto que se aprende y se desarrolla con los años, bajo la doctrina de los padres y/o un entorno repleto de malas personas.
item.content:encoded:
Nadie nace racista. Ningún niño es racista.

Es un defecto que se aprende y se desarrolla con los años, bajo la doctrina de los padres y/o un entorno repleto de malas personas.

item.title: The Amazon & Congo Basin are not just forests. They are the …
item.author: Abilu Tangwa. (@abilutangwa.bsky.social)
item.description:
The Amazon & Congo Basin are not just forests. They are the lungs of the planet.
They store billions of tons of carbon, regulate our climate, and house 80% of Earth's biodiversity.
If they fall, we all fall.
No to deforestation. No to ecocide. #ClimateAction
item.content:encoded:
The Amazon & Congo Basin are not just forests. They are the lungs of the planet.
They store billions of tons of carbon, regulate our climate, and house 80% of Earth's biodiversity.
If they fall, we all fall.
No to deforestation. No to ecocide. #ClimateAction

item.author: Bodega Cats (@bodegacats.bsky.social)

item.title: The Milky Way over a northern Minnesota river. Looks like th…
item.author: Mike Saunders 🇺🇦 (@hardwaterhacker.bsky.social)
item.description: The Milky Way over a northern Minnesota river. Looks like there's only one satellite in this photo. That's pretty unusual these days.
item.content:encoded: The Milky Way over a northern Minnesota river. Looks like there's only one satellite in this photo. That's pretty unusual these days.
